channel.title: Researches on Courtney A. Shearer
channel.description: Recent content in Researches on Courtney A. Shearer

item.description: <!-- --- title: "Machine Learning Approaches for Optimal Experimental Design in Biological Systems" date: 2024-01-01 venue: "In progress · Harvard SSQB" authors: "**Courtney A. Shearer**, et al." abstract: "Developing active learning frameworks to minimize the number of experiments required to learn accurate models of biological systems, with applications to gene regulatory networks." --- -->
